name: Duo Survival 2
author: Poki
description: Duo Survival 2 is a 2-player cooperative puzzle game by 7Spot Games. Help them escape from the zombie horde by playing to each character's strengths. Solve brilliant puzzles, crawl through hidden rooms, activate exciting contraptions, and much more! Our favorite zombie apocalypse survivor pair is back for more adventures. Can you help the two heroes find the cure? Try playing with your friend to maximize the fun. Controls: Move - AD or Left/Right arrow keys Jump - W or Up arrow key Kick/Throw bottle - S or Down arrow key About the creator: Duo Survival 2 was created by 7Spot Games, a Lithuanian video game developer and publisher. Play their other entertaining games for free on Poki : Duo Vikings , Duo Survival , ZOOM-BE , ZOOM-BE 2 , ZOOM-BE 3 and Truck Loader 5
